TrGatewayConfigurations.BCConfigurations:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.bcdk.BCDKConfigurationInfo"> 
  <void property="JCAAdapterConfig"> 
   <string><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ESBAdapterConfigurations>
    <ConnectionLess>false</ConnectionLess>
    <isConfigurationRequired>true</isConfigurationRequired>
    <isLicensed>true</isLicensed>
    <Inbound>false</Inbound>
    <AdapterInstanceProperties><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ESBAdapterInstanceProperties"> 
  <void property="GUID"> 
   <string>DB</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="appName"> 
   <string>REQTODBINSERT</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="appVersion"> 
   <string>1_0</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="domain"> 
   <string>BCConfigPropertySheet</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="instanceName"> 
   <string>DB1</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="logCategories"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>DBManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>DBManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName">

     <void property="loggerLevel">

     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.db.spi.outbound.DBManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>DBServiceDefaultErrorHandler</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription">

     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>DBServiceDefaultErrorHandler</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.adapter.db.DBServiceDefaultErrorHandler</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>DBServiceErrorHandlerImpl</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>DBServiceErrorHandlerImpl</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>DBServiceErrorHandlerImpl</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.db.DBServiceErrorHandlerImpl</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>DBInteraction</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription">

     </void>

  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></AdapterInstanceProperties>
    <ConfigurationObjects>
        <ConfigurationObject><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName"> 
   <class>fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.cci.ESBConnectionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="beanObject"> 
   <void property="MCFClassName"> 
    <string>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.db.spi.outbound.DBManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="implClassName"> 
   <class>fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.cci.ESBConnectionSpec</class> 
  </void>

  </void> 
 </object>

]]></ConfigurationObject>
        <ConfigurationObject><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.db.cci.DBInteractionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="beanObject"> 
   <void property="DBServicePropertyModelXml"> 
    <string>
&lt;Model&gt;
  &lt;Data&gt;&amp;lt;?xml version=&amp;quot;1.0&amp;quot; encoding=&amp;quot;UTF-8&amp;quot;?&amp;gt;&#13;
&amp;lt;Tif_DBAdapterConfiguration&amp;gt;&#13;
    &amp;lt;Tif_DatabaseConfiguration/&amp;gt;&#13;
    &amp;lt;Tif_SQLConfiguration name=&amp;quot;SQL_CFG_1&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;PublishSubscribe&amp;quot; inputType=&amp;quot;Data&amp;quot; runMode=&amp;quot;Sequential&amp;quot; sendOutputMode=&amp;quot;AfterEveryQuery&amp;quot; dataFormat=&amp;quot;xml&amp;quot; spReturnsRs=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; zeroUpdateAsExcep=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; HandleZeroUpdateExcp=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_PreProcessing/&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_QueryInfo name=&amp;quot;Select&amp;quot; outputNeedToBeSent=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; postProcessingMode=&amp;quot;AfterEverySend&amp;quot; includeQueryNameInOutput=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&#13;
            &amp;lt;Tif_Statement&amp;gt;&#13;
                &amp;lt;Tif_SelectQuery&amp;gt;&amp;lt;![CDATA[SELECT &amp;quot;public&amp;quot;.&amp;quot;employeetable&amp;quot;.&amp;quot;empid&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;public&amp;quot;.&amp;quot;employeetable&amp;quot;.&amp;quot;empname&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;public&amp;quot;.&amp;quot;employeetable&amp;quot;.&amp;quot;empage&amp;quot; FROM &amp;quot;public&amp;quot;.&amp;quot;employeetable&amp;quot;&#13;
WHERE &amp;quot;empid&amp;quot; = ?   ]]&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/Tif_SelectQuery&amp;gt;&#13;
            &amp;lt;/Tif_Statement&amp;gt;&#13;
            &amp;lt;Tif_QueryRequest&amp;gt;&#13;
                &amp;lt;Tif_InParameter bindPosition=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; bindName=&amp;quot;empid&amp;quot; sqlTypeName=&amp;quot;serial&amp;quot; javaTypeName=&amp;quot;INTEGER&amp;quot; map=&amp;quot;/Select/empid&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&#13;
                    &amp;lt;DefaultValue&amp;gt;(&apos;employeetable_empid_seq&apos;::regclass&amp;lt;/DefaultValue&amp;gt;&#13;
                &amp;lt;/Tif_InParameter&amp;gt;&#13;
            &amp;lt;/Tif_QueryRequest&amp;gt;&#13;
            &amp;lt;Tif_QueryResponse&amp;gt;&#13;
                &amp;lt;Tif_ResultSet outputName=&amp;quot;Select&amp;quot; includeInOutput=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&#13;
                    &amp;lt;Tif_Column bindPosition=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; bindName=&amp;quot;empid&amp;quot; sqlTypeName=&amp;quot;serial&amp;quot; javaTypeName=&amp;quot;INTEGER&amp;quot; includeInOutput=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; outputName=&amp;quot;empid&amp;quot; OutputType=&amp;quot;PCDATA&amp;quot;/&amp;gt;&#13;
                    &amp;lt;Tif_Column bindPosition=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; bindName=&amp;quot;empname&amp;quot; sqlTypeName=&amp;quot;varchar&amp;quot; javaTypeName=&amp;quot;VARCHAR&amp;quot; includeInOutput=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; outputName=&amp;quot;empname&amp;quot; OutputType=&amp;quot;PCDATA&amp;quot;/&amp;gt;&#13;
                    &amp;lt;Tif_Column bindPosition=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot; bindName=&amp;quot;empage&amp;quot; sqlTypeName=&amp;quot;int4&amp;quot; javaTypeName=&amp;quot;INTEGER&amp;quot; includeInOutput=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; outputName=&amp;quot;empage&amp;quot; OutputType=&amp;quot;PCDATA&amp;quot;/&amp;gt;&#13;
                &amp;lt;/Tif_ResultSet&amp;gt;&#13;
            &amp;lt;/Tif_QueryResponse&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;/Tif_QueryInfo&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_PostProcessing/&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;CSVConfig EnableCSV=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; FieldSeparator=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; LineSeparator=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; WrapCharacter=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; AppendHeaders=&amp;quot;Append Headers for all Messages&amp;quot;/&amp;gt;&#13;
    &amp;lt;/Tif_SQLConfiguration&amp;gt;&#13;
    &amp;lt;Tif_TypeDefinition/&amp;gt;&#13;
    &amp;lt;Tif_AdvancedSettings&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_QueryTimeout&amp;gt;60&amp;lt;/Tif_QueryTimeout&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_JdbcDriverLoggingEnabled&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_JdbcDriverLoggingEnabled&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_MaxFetchSize&amp;gt;200&amp;lt;/Tif_MaxFetchSize&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_MaxResponseSize&amp;gt;100&amp;lt;/Tif_MaxResponseSize&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_MaxBatchUpdateSize&amp;gt;0&amp;lt;/Tif_MaxBatchUpdateSize&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_UseBatching&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_UseBatching&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_Commit mode=&amp;quot;AfterDocument&amp;quot;/&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_DateTimeFormat&amp;gt;XML_DATE_TIME_FORMAT&amp;lt;/Tif_DateTimeFormat&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_EnableResponseGUID&amp;gt;true&amp;lt;/Tif_EnableResponseGUID&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_EnableInputSend&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_EnableInputSend&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_SendNoRowSelectedOutput&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_SendNoRowSelectedOutput&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_GenerateEmptyResultSet&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_GenerateEmptyResultSet&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_CloseConnectionAfterEveryRequest&amp;gt;true&amp;lt;/Tif_CloseConnectionAfterEveryRequest&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_SPReturnsRS&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_SPReturnsRS&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_ZeroUpdateAsExcep&amp;gt;true&amp;lt;/Tif_ZeroUpdateAsExcep&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_HandleZeroUpdateExcp&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_HandleZeroUpdateExcp&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_EmptyNodeAsNull&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_EmptyNodeAsNull&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_CleardbobjectsAfterRequest&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_CleardbobjectsAfterRequest&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_UseExternalTransactions&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_UseExternalTransactions&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_NameStartWrapChar&amp;gt;&amp;quot;&amp;lt;/Tif_NameStartWrapChar&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_NameEndWrapChar&amp;gt;&amp;quot;&amp;lt;/Tif_NameEndWrapChar&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_WrapDBObjectNames&amp;gt;true&amp;lt;/Tif_WrapDBObjectNames&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_RemoveSchemaPrefixFromColumnNames&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_RemoveSchemaPrefixFromColumnNames&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_ActionOnException&amp;gt;Rollback&amp;lt;/Tif_ActionOnException&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_NoExecNestedQueryEmptyResultset&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_NoExecNestedQueryEmptyResultset&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_Param name=&amp;quot;DBConnectionPingSQL&amp;quot;&amp;gt;select 1&amp;lt;/Tif_Param&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_Param name=&amp;quot;ValidateDBConUsingDummyTable&amp;quot;&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_Param&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_Param name=&amp;quot;ValidateInputXML&amp;quot;&amp;gt;false&amp;lt;/Tif_Param&amp;gt;&#13;
        &amp;lt;Tif_Param name=&amp;quot;DummyTableName&amp;quot;&amp;gt;TIFOSI_DUMMY&amp;lt;/Tif_Param&amp;gt;&#13;
    &amp;lt;/Tif_AdvancedSettings&amp;gt;&#13;
&amp;lt;/Tif_DBAdapterConfiguration&amp;gt;&#13;
&lt;/Data&gt;
  &lt;Data&gt;#dbconfig&#13;
#Mon Jul 28 16:23:52 IST 2025&#13;
Cleanup\ database\ objects\ after\ every\ request=false&#13;
Disable\ Exception\ Handling\ for\ zero\ update\ count=true&#13;
Treat\ empty\ node\ in\ input\ XML\ as\ null=false&#13;
Enable\ Native\ Format=false&#13;
Database\ action\ on\ Exception=Rollback&#13;
Maximum\ Response\ Size=100&#13;
Treat\ zero\ update\ count\ as\ Exception=true&#13;
Use\ Batching=false&#13;
Add\ Response\ GUID=true&#13;
Batch\ Size=0&#13;
Use\ External\ Transactions=false&#13;
Do\ not\ execute\ nested\ queries\ for\ no\ resultset=false&#13;
Validate\ Connection\ using\ Dummy\ Table=false&#13;
Generate\ result\ sets\ for\ queries\ returning\ no\ records=false&#13;
SCHEDULER_ENABLED=Publish Results&#13;
Dummy\ Table\ Name=TIFOSI_DUMMY&#13;
Generate\ response\ for\ no\ selected\ records=false&#13;
Database\ Connection\ Ping\ SQL=select 1&#13;
Commit\ Mode=AfterDocument&#13;
&lt;/Data&gt;
&lt;/Model&gt;</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="configuredVersion"> 
    <int>1300</int> 
   </void> 
   <void property="enableSchedulingOn"> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorActionsMap"> 
     <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>2</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>4</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.RetryErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>1</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>3</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
      </void> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>1</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="active"> 
           <boolean>true</boolean> 
          </void> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>4</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.RetryErrorAction"> 
          <void property="active"> 
           <boolean>true</boolean> 
          </void> 
          <void property="noOfRetries"> 
           <int>10</int> 
          </void> 
          <void property="repeatInterval"> 
           <long>300000</long> 
          </void> 
          <void property="sendErrorAfterTries"> 
           <int>2</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
      </void> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>0</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"/> 
      </void> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void property="guid"> 
    <string>DB</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="id"> 
    <string>REQTODBINSERT__1_0__DB1</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="targetNamespace"> 
    <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1</string> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="category"> 
   <string>DB</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="configParams"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>enableScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsStudio</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="description"> 
   <string>The DBAdapter is a Query Engine that creates and executes a single SQL Statement or a set of queries to perform the database related operations such as insertion, updation, deletion; stored procedure execution; or table monitoring</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="icon"> 
   <string>dbcomponent.png</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="implClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.db.cci.DBInteractionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="name"> 
   <string>DB</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="type"> 
   <string>javax.resource.cci.InteractionSpec</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></ConfigurationObject>
        <ConfigurationObject><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName">

   </void>

   </void>

    <void property="configName"> 
     <string>DBdetails</string> 
    </void> 
   </void>

   </void>

    <string>REQTODBINSERT__1_0__DB1</string> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="category">

  </void> 
  <void property="configParams"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsReconnection</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>enableScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsStudio</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
  </void>

  </void> 
  <void property="icon">

  </void>

  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></ConfigurationObject>

    <InputRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>SQL_CFG_1</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; elementFormDefault=&quot;qualified&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Request&quot;&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;SQL_CFG_1&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;Select&quot;&gt;&#13;
                    &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;empid&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:attribute name=&quot;id&quot; type=&quot;xsd:long&quot; use=&quot;optional&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;&#13;
</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Request</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></InputRecordDefinition>
    <OutputRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>SQL_CFG_1</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; elementFormDefault=&quot;qualified&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Response&quot;&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;SQL_CFG_1&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;Select&quot;&gt;&#13;
                    &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                        &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;empid&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;empname&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;empage&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                        &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:attribute name=&quot;id&quot; type=&quot;xsd:long&quot; use=&quot;optional&quot;/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;&#13;
</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Response</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></OutputRecordDefinition>
    <FaultRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>Error</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot; ?&gt;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault&quot;&gt;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Error&quot;&gt;
       &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;
          &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorCode&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorMessage&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorDetail&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;data&quot; type=&quot;tns:data&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;
          &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;
       &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;data&quot;&gt;
	  &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;
         &lt;xsd:any namespace=&quot;##any&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; processContents=&quot;lax&quot;/&gt;
      &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></FaultRecordDefinition>
</ESBAdapterConfigurations>
</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java>
